name: crdc-popsci-cgc-data-transfer
description: This microservice supports interoperability between the Population Science Data Commons(PSDC) and Cancer Genomics Cloud (CGC) to enable secure sharing of file manifest data.

comments.overrides: Security vulnerability fixes for transitive dependencies
comments.fast-xml-builder: CVE-2026-44665 - vulnerability in fast-xml-builder. Transitive dep of fast-xml-parser. Fixed in v1.1.7+
comments.fast-xml-parser: CVE-2026-27942 (CVSS 6.9) - Buffer Overflow in XMLBuilder. CVE-2026-33036, CVE-2026-33349 (fixed v5.5.6/5.5.7), CVE-2026-41650 (fixed v5.7.0). Transitive dep from @aws-sdk/client-s3. Fixed in v5.7.0+
comments.glob: CVE-2025-64756 (HIGH) - Command Injection vulnerability via malicious filenames. Fixed in v11.1.0+
comments.minimatch: Multiple CVEs (HIGH) - CVE-2026-26996, CVE-2026-27903, CVE-2026-27904: Denial of Service via specially crafted glob patterns. Fixed in v10.2.3+
comments.path-to-regexp: CVE-2026-4867 - vulnerability in path-to-regexp 0.1.x. Transitive dep from express. Fixed in v0.1.13
comments.qs: CVE-2026-8723 - vulnerability in qs. Transitive dep from express, body-parser. Fixed in v6.15.2
comments.tar: Multiple CVEs (HIGH) - CVE-2026-23745 (file overwrite/symlink poisoning), CVE-2026-23950 (Unicode path collision), CVE-2026-24842 (path traversal), CVE-2026-26960 (arbitrary file read/write), GHSA-qffp-2rhf-9h96 (hardlink path traversal). Fixed in v7.5.10+
